languages.text: "Ради всего святого, объясни мне, чем ты занимаешься?" {n}Слова Ювенны звенят от досады.{/n} "Еще немного — и я подумаю, будто ты намеренно саботируешь наш план".
"For Throne's sake, what are you doing? Explain yourself." {n}Juvenna's words ring with irritation.{/n} "Any more of this, and I shall begin to think you are deliberately sabotaging our plan."
languages.original_text: "Ради всего святого, объясни мне, чем ты занимаешься?" {n}Слова Ювенны звенят от досады.{/n} "Еще немного — и я подумаю, будто ты намеренно саботируешь наш план".

traits.locale_text: "For Throne's sake, what are you doing? Explain yourself." {n}Juvenna's words ring with irritation.{/n} "Any more of this, and I shall begin to think you are deliberately sabotaging our plan."
"For Throne's sake, what are you doing? Explain yourself." {n}Juvenna's words ring with irritation.{/n} "Any more of this, and I shall begin to think you are deliberately sabotaging our plan."
"For Throne's sake, what are you doing? Explain yourself." {n}Juvenna's words ring with irritation.{/n} "Any more of this, and I shall begin to think you are deliberately sabotaging our plan."

languages.text: «Por el Trono, ¿qué está haciendo? Explíquese». {n}Las palabras de Juvenna están cargadas de irritación.{/n} «Si continúa así, empezaré a creer que está saboteando deliberadamente nuestro plan».
languages.original_text: "For Throne's sake, what are you doing? Explain yourself." {n}Juvenna's words ring with irritation.{/n} "Any more of this, and I shall begin to think you are deliberately sabotaging our plan."

traits.locale_text: «Por el Trono, ¿qué está haciendo? Explíquese». {n}Las palabras de Juvenna están cargadas de irritación.{/n} «Si continúa así, empezaré a creer que está saboteando deliberadamente nuestro plan».

languages.text: “黄金王座在上，你这是干什么？给我解释清楚。”{n}尤文娜的语气中带着恼怒。{/n}“再这样下去，我都要怀疑你故意破坏我们的计划了。”
languages.original_text: "For Throne's sake, what are you doing? Explain yourself." {n}Juvenna's words ring with irritation.{/n} "Any more of this, and I shall begin to think you are deliberately sabotaging our plan."

traits.locale_text: “黄金王座在上，你这是干什么？给我解释清楚。”{n}尤文娜的语气中带着恼怒。{/n}“再这样下去，我都要怀疑你故意破坏我们的计划了。”

languages.text: « Au nom du Trône, on peut savoir ce que vous fabriquez ? J'exige des explications. » {n}Les propos de Juvenna résonnent au diapason de son irritation.{/n} « Encore un peu, et je commencerai à croire que vous sabotez délibérément notre opération. »
languages.original_text: "For Throne's sake, what are you doing? Explain yourself." {n}Juvenna's words ring with irritation.{/n} "Any more of this, and I shall begin to think you are deliberately sabotaging our plan."

traits.locale_text: « Au nom du Trône, on peut savoir ce que vous fabriquez ? J'exige des explications. » {n}Les propos de Juvenna résonnent au diapason de son irritation.{/n} « Encore un peu, et je commencerai à croire que vous sabotez délibérément notre opération. »

languages.text: "Taht aşkına, ne yapıyorsunuz? Açıklayın." {n}Juvenna'nın sözleri sinirle çınlıyor.{/n} "Bundan biraz daha fazlası, planımızı kasten sabote ettiğinizi düşünmeme neden olacak."
languages.original_text: "For Throne's sake, what are you doing? Explain yourself." {n}Juvenna's words ring with irritation.{/n} "Any more of this, and I shall begin to think you are deliberately sabotaging our plan."

traits.locale_text: "Taht aşkına, ne yapıyorsunuz? Açıklayın." {n}Juvenna'nın sözleri sinirle çınlıyor.{/n} "Bundan biraz daha fazlası, planımızı kasten sabote ettiğinizi düşünmeme neden olacak."

languages.text: "Beim Thron, was macht Ihr da? Erklärt Euch." {n}Juvenna ist sichtlich verärgert.{/n} "Noch so eine Aktion und ich könnte denken, dass Ihr unseren Plan absichtlich sabotiert."
languages.original_text: "For Throne's sake, what are you doing? Explain yourself." {n}Juvenna's words ring with irritation.{/n} "Any more of this, and I shall begin to think you are deliberately sabotaging our plan."

traits.locale_text: "Beim Thron, was macht Ihr da? Erklärt Euch." {n}Juvenna ist sichtlich verärgert.{/n} "Noch so eine Aktion und ich könnte denken, dass Ihr unseren Plan absichtlich sabotiert."

languages.text: 「王のために、君は何をしているんだ？説明しろ。」{n}ジュベナは苛立ちを込めて言った。{/n}「これ以上続けたら、君がわざと計画を妨害していると思うだろう。」
languages.original_text: "For Throne's sake, what are you doing? Explain yourself." {n}Juvenna's words ring with irritation.{/n} "Any more of this, and I shall begin to think you are deliberately sabotaging our plan."

traits.locale_text: 「王のために、君は何をしているんだ？説明しろ。」{n}ジュベナは苛立ちを込めて言った。{/n}「これ以上続けたら、君がわざと計画を妨害していると思うだろう。」
